_meta.description: Bilingual glossary source-of-truth for the BEDC dossier visualization. Each entry maps a project key (region id, kernel concept, or framework term) to {en, zh} labels and descriptions. Edit this file to add or revise terms; tools/build_dossier_status.py copies it to docs/dossier/data/glossary.json on each dossier deploy.

en.label: BHist
en.desc: Closed inductive type of distinction histories. Empty / E0 / E1.

zh.label: BHist
zh.desc: 区分历史的闭合归纳类型. Empty / E0 / E1.

en.label: Hist
en.desc: A specific value of BHist; the trace of an observer's distinctions.

zh.label: Hist
zh.desc: BHist 的具体值; 一个观察者的区分轨迹.

en.label: Cont
en.desc: Continuation relation: Cont(h, m, h') means h continues to h' by emitting mark m.

zh.label: Cont
zh.desc: 延展关系: Cont(h, m, h') 表示 h 通过 emit mark m 延续为 h'.

en.label: hsame
en.desc: History sameness: identifies two Hists as the same observer trace.

zh.label: hsame
zh.desc: 历史同一性: 把两个 Hist 认定为同一个观察者轨迹.

en.label: psame
en.desc: Package sameness: classifier on Package values.

zh.label: psame
zh.desc: Package 同一性: Package 值上的分类器.

en.label: msame
en.desc: Mark sameness: identifies two BMarks.

zh.label: msame
zh.desc: Mark 同一性: 识别两个 BMark.

en.label: E0
en.desc: One of two binary distinction constructors on BHist.

zh.label: E0
zh.desc: BHist 上两个二元区分构造子之一.

en.label: E1
en.desc: The other binary distinction constructor on BHist.

zh.label: E1
zh.desc: BHist 上另一个二元区分构造子.

en.label: emp
en.desc: The empty Hist value; pre-distinction state, observer with no marks.

zh.label: emp
zh.desc: 空 Hist 值; 区分之前状态, 无 mark 的观察者.

en.label: Mark / BMark
en.desc: An emission step appended to a Hist; b0 / b1 binary distinguishing acts.

zh.label: Mark / BMark
zh.desc: 附加到 Hist 上的 emit 步骤; b0 / b1 二元区分动作.

en.label: Ext
en.desc: Extension predicate: h is a prefix of h' under repeated marks.

zh.label: Ext
zh.desc: 延展谓词: h 是 h' 在重复 mark 下的前缀.

en.label: ProbeName / PN
en.desc: Identifier for a probe; carrier predicate of a name interface.

zh.label: ProbeName / PN
zh.desc: 探针的标识符; 命名接口的载体谓词.

en.label: Bundle
en.desc: Probe bundle inductive type; Bnil terminator and Bcons constructor.

zh.label: Bundle
zh.desc: 探针包的闭合归纳类型; Bnil 终止子和 Bcons 构造子.

en.label: Sig
en.desc: Signature: the structural shape of a name (carrier + classifier types).

zh.label: Sig
zh.desc: 签名: 名字的结构形状(载体+分类器类型).

en.label: sameSig
en.desc: Signature sameness: classifier on Sig values.

zh.label: sameSig
zh.desc: 签名同一性: Sig 值上的分类器.

en.label: Pkg / Package
en.desc: Package: a Sig + carrier predicate + classifier triple over Hist.

zh.label: Pkg / Package
zh.desc: 包: Sig + 载体谓词 + 分类器的三元组, 建在 Hist 上.

en.label: Gap
en.desc: Gap predicate: structured difference between packages within a unified frame.

zh.label: Gap
zh.desc: Gap 谓词: 同一框架下两个 package 间的结构性差异.

en.label: InGap
en.desc: Membership in a Gap; the bridging predicate.

zh.label: InGap
zh.desc: Gap 中成员; 桥接谓词.

en.label: PackagePolicy
en.desc: Policy controlling which Sig + carrier + classifier shapes count as a Package.

zh.label: PackagePolicy
zh.desc: 控制哪些 Sig + 载体 + 分类器形状算 Package 的策略.

en.label: GapPolicy
en.desc: Policy controlling which Gap predicates are admissible.

zh.label: GapPolicy
zh.desc: 控制哪些 Gap 谓词可接受的策略.

en.label: Ev
en.desc: Evidence: a witnessing element for a probe predicate.

zh.label: Ev
zh.desc: 证据: 探针谓词的见证元素.

en.label: Ask
en.desc: Inquiry primitive: 'does this Hist satisfy this probe?'

zh.label: Ask
zh.desc: 询问原语: '这条 Hist 是否满足该探针?'

en.label: AskPolicy
en.desc: Policy: which Ask requests are answerable from local data.

zh.label: AskPolicy
zh.desc: 策略: 哪些 Ask 请求可以由本地数据回答.

en.label: Stage
en.desc: Continuation stage: a step in a multi-stage proof / computation pipeline.

zh.label: Stage
zh.desc: 延展阶段: 多阶段证明 / 计算流水线中的一步.

en.label: Thread
en.desc: A linear sequence of stages; the path of a computation through stages.

zh.label: Thread
zh.desc: 阶段的线性序列; 计算穿过阶段的路径.

en.label: Seal
en.desc: A finalization marker on a stage; commits the stage to its result.

zh.label: Seal
zh.desc: 阶段上的终结标记; 把该阶段固定到其结果.

en.label: TokIntro
en.desc: Token introduction rule: how a fresh token enters a context.

zh.label: TokIntro
zh.desc: 标识引入规则: 新标识如何进入上下文.

en.label: TokUnique
en.desc: Token uniqueness predicate: identical tokens classify identically.

zh.label: TokUnique
zh.desc: 标识唯一性谓词: 相同标识被同样分类.

en.label: Unary
en.desc: Unary-history predicate: only E1 marks, no E0; encodes natural numbers.

zh.label: Unary
zh.desc: 一元历史谓词: 只有 E1 没有 E0; 编码自然数.

en.label: UnaryCont
en.desc: Unary continuation: extends a unary Hist by one E1 step.

zh.label: UnaryCont
zh.desc: 一元延展: 把一元 Hist 加一步 E1.

en.label: UnaryShift
en.desc: Unary shift: re-indexing a unary Hist by a constant offset.

zh.label: UnaryShift
zh.desc: 一元位移: 用常数偏移重索引一元 Hist.

en.label: UnaryHistory
en.desc: Restriction of Hist to unary segments; the inhabitation predicate of Nat.

zh.label: UnaryHistory
zh.desc: Hist 限于一元段; Nat 的居留谓词.

en.label: RegSeqRat
en.desc: Regular Cauchy rational sequence: explicit modulus + bounded variation.

zh.label: RegSeqRat
zh.desc: 正则有理 Cauchy 序列: 显式模量 + 有界变差.

en.label: DyadicRatCore
en.desc: Dyadic rational core; explicit binary fractions used in real construction.

zh.label: DyadicRatCore
zh.desc: 二进有理核; 实数构造中使用的显式二进分数.

en.label: StreamCarrier
en.desc: Carrier predicate for a stream-name (a co-inductive Hist as Real witness).

zh.label: StreamCarrier
zh.desc: 流命名的载体谓词(共归纳 Hist 作实数见证).

en.label: StreamSame
en.desc: Stream sameness; classifier on stream carriers (~ regular Cauchy equivalence).

zh.label: StreamSame
zh.desc: 流同一性; 流载体上的分类器(~ 正则 Cauchy 等价).

en.label: BaseReflect
en.desc: Base-reflection structure exposing the kernel inside a verification target.

zh.label: BaseReflect
zh.desc: 基础反射结构, 在验证目标里暴露内核.

en.label: NameCert
en.desc: Naming certificate: 5-field structure (carrier, classifier, closure laws) replacing Quot.

zh.label: NameCert
zh.desc: 命名证书: 5 字段结构(载体, 分类器, 闭合律), 替代 Quot.

en.label: SourceSpec
en.desc: Source specification: which Hists qualify as carriers.

zh.label: SourceSpec
zh.desc: 源规范: 哪些 Hist 满足载体条件.

en.label: PatternSpec
en.desc: Pattern specification: shape of admissible patterns.

zh.label: PatternSpec
zh.desc: 模式规范: 可接受模式的形状.

en.label: ClassifierSpec
en.desc: Classifier specification: when two carriers are equivalent.

zh.label: ClassifierSpec
zh.desc: 分类器规范: 两个载体何时等价.

en.label: StabilityCert
en.desc: Stability certificate: hsame-respect of carrier and classifier.

zh.label: StabilityCert
zh.desc: 稳定证书: 载体和分类器对 hsame 的尊重.

en.label: LedgerPolicy
en.desc: Ledger policy: structural laws of the certificate.

zh.label: LedgerPolicy
zh.desc: 账本策略: 证书的结构性律法.

en.label: ClosureCert
en.desc: Closure certificate: the kernel's invariance under its closure operator.

zh.label: ClosureCert
zh.desc: 闭合证书: 内核在其闭合算子下的不变性.

en.label: DescentCert
en.desc: Descent certificate: passing from a quotient-like cover to its base.

zh.label: DescentCert
zh.desc: 下降证书: 从类似商的覆盖回到底.

en.label: CompositionCert
en.desc: Composition certificate: how two certificates compose under a binary operation.

zh.label: CompositionCert
zh.desc: 合成证书: 两个证书在二元运算下如何合成.

en.label: ReuseCert
en.desc: Reuse certificate: licenses a derived theorem via an existing primary one.

zh.label: ReuseCert
zh.desc: 复用证书: 通过已有主证书 license 一个派生定理.

en.label: SealCert
en.desc: Seal certificate: finalisation evidence for a multi-stage object.

zh.label: SealCert
zh.desc: 封证书: 多阶段对象的终结见证.

en.label: axiom-purity
en.desc: BEDC invariant: no Classical.choice, no Quot.sound, no propext.

zh.label: axiom-purity
zh.desc: BEDC 不变量: 禁 Classical.choice / Quot.sound / propext.

en.label: schema-only horizon
en.desc: Interface formalized but closed witnesses deferred.

zh.label: schema-only 视界
zh.desc: 接口已形式化但闭合 witness 推迟.

en.label: Two-loops theorem
en.desc: Ground self-reference closes (form of distinction); meta self-reference must not (Tarski).

zh.label: 两环定理
zh.desc: 地基自指闭合(区分形式); 元层自指不能闭合(Tarski).

en.label: Distinction-foundationalism
en.desc: Information starts with distinction; before any distinction, no information exists.

zh.label: 区分基础主义
zh.desc: 信息源于区分; 任何区分之前, 没有信息.

en.label: Form of distinction
en.desc: The minimal structural template of separating one Hist into two by a single mark.

zh.label: 区分形式
zh.desc: 用单一 mark 把一段 Hist 分成两段的最小结构模板.

en.label: Strict prefix
en.desc: Order witnessing one Hist as a prefix of another, used as constructive < on unary.

zh.label: 严格前缀
zh.desc: 见证一段 Hist 是另一段前缀的序; 用作一元上的构造性 <.

en.label: Finite Kernel
en.desc: BHist + Cont + hsame: the three primitives everything is built on.

zh.label: 有限内核
zh.desc: BHist + Cont + hsame: 一切都建在这三个原语上.

en.label: Nat
en.desc: Unary natural numbers as Hist segments.

zh.label: 自然数
zh.desc: 一元自然数, 作为 Hist 段.

en.label: AddUp
en.desc: Additive structure on natural numbers.

zh.label: AddUp
zh.desc: 自然数上的加法结构.

en.label: Int
en.desc: Integers as signed pairs of Nat.

zh.label: 整数
zh.desc: 整数, 作为带符号 Nat 对.

en.label: Rat
en.desc: Rationals as Int / positive Nat pairs.

zh.label: 有理数
zh.desc: 有理数, 作为 Int / 正 Nat 对.

en.label: Real
en.desc: Reals as regular Cauchy sequences over Rat.

zh.label: 实数
zh.desc: 实数, 作为 Rat 上的正则 Cauchy 序列.

en.label: Complex
en.desc: Complex numbers as pairs of Reals.

zh.label: 复数
zh.desc: 复数, 作为实数对.

en.label: BoolUp
en.desc: Booleans as a 2-element finite Hist type.

zh.label: BoolUp
zh.desc: 布尔值, 作为 2-元素有限 Hist 类型.

en.label: OptionUp
en.desc: Optional values: none / some(x).

zh.label: OptionUp
zh.desc: 可选值: none / some(x).

en.label: ProdUp
en.desc: Product types A x B as Hist pairs.

zh.label: ProdUp
zh.desc: 乘积类型 A x B, 作为 Hist 对.

en.label: SumUp
en.desc: Sum types A + B as tagged Hist.

zh.label: SumUp
zh.desc: 和类型 A + B, 作为带标签 Hist.

en.label: ListUp
en.desc: Lists over a base type, as Hist sequences.

zh.label: ListUp
zh.desc: 列表, 作为 Hist 序列.

en.label: PrimeUp
en.desc: Primality predicate; Euclid's infinitude; FTA.

zh.label: PrimeUp
zh.desc: 素数谓词; Euclid 无穷性; 算术基本定理.

en.label: MonoidUp
en.desc: Monoid: associative binary op + unit.

zh.label: MonoidUp
zh.desc: 幺半群: 结合性二元运算 + 单位.

en.label: GroupUp
en.desc: Group: monoid + inverse element.

zh.label: GroupUp
zh.desc: 群: 幺半群 + 逆元.

en.label: AbGroupUp
en.desc: Abelian group: commutative group.

zh.label: AbGroupUp
zh.desc: 阿贝尔群: 可交换群.

en.label: RingUp
en.desc: Ring: AbGroup + multiplicative monoid + distributivity.

zh.label: RingUp
zh.desc: 环: AbGroup + 乘法幺半群 + 分配律.

en.label: CommRingUp
en.desc: Commutative ring.

zh.label: CommRingUp
zh.desc: 交换环.

en.label: FieldUp
en.desc: Field: commutative ring + multiplicative inverses for nonzero.

zh.label: FieldUp
zh.desc: 域: 交换环 + 非零元有乘法逆.

en.label: ModuleUp
en.desc: Module over a ring.

zh.label: ModuleUp
zh.desc: 环上的模.

en.label: VecSpaceUp
en.desc: Vector space over a field.

zh.label: VecSpaceUp
zh.desc: 域上的向量空间.

en.label: LinearMapUp
en.desc: Linear map between modules.

zh.label: LinearMapUp
zh.desc: 模之间的线性映射.

en.label: MatrixUp
en.desc: Matrices over a ring.

zh.label: MatrixUp
zh.desc: 环上的矩阵.

en.label: PolynomialUp
en.desc: Polynomials in one variable.

zh.label: PolynomialUp
zh.desc: 单变量多项式.

en.label: FormalPowerSeriesUp
en.desc: Formal power series.

zh.label: FormalPowerSeriesUp
zh.desc: 形式幂级数.

en.label: PreorderUp
en.desc: Preorder: reflexive + transitive.

zh.label: PreorderUp
zh.desc: 预序: 自反 + 传递.

en.label: POSetUp
en.desc: Partial order: preorder + antisymmetry.

zh.label: POSetUp
zh.desc: 偏序: 预序 + 反对称.

en.label: TotalOrderUp
en.desc: Total order: poset + trichotomy.

zh.label: TotalOrderUp
zh.desc: 全序: 偏序 + 三分律.

en.label: LatticeUp
en.desc: Lattice: poset with binary join and meet.

zh.label: LatticeUp
zh.desc: 格: 带二元 join / meet 的偏序.

en.label: IntervalUp
en.desc: Closed interval [a, b] over a totally-ordered carrier.

zh.label: IntervalUp
zh.desc: 全序载体上的闭区间 [a, b].

en.label: MetricSpaceUp
en.desc: Metric space: distance with triangle inequality.

zh.label: MetricSpaceUp
zh.desc: 度量空间: 满足三角不等式的距离.

en.label: CompactUp
en.desc: Compactness: total boundedness + completeness.

zh.label: CompactUp
zh.desc: 紧致性: 全有界 + 完备.

en.label: ContinuousUp
en.desc: Continuous functions with explicit modulus.

zh.label: ContinuousUp
zh.desc: 带显式模量的连续函数.

en.label: S1Up
en.desc: Circle S^1 as a quotient of the unit interval.

zh.label: S1Up
zh.desc: 圆 S^1, 作为单位区间的商.

en.label: CircleUp
en.desc: Circle as compact 1-manifold.

zh.label: CircleUp
zh.desc: 圆, 作为紧致 1-流形.

en.label: CategoryUp
en.desc: Category as Hist of objects + Cont as Hom.

zh.label: CategoryUp
zh.desc: 范畴, 对象=Hist, Hom=Cont.

en.label: FunctorUp
en.desc: Functor between categories.

zh.label: FunctorUp
zh.desc: 范畴间的函子.

en.label: NatTransUp
en.desc: Natural transformation.

zh.label: NatTransUp
zh.desc: 自然变换.

en.label: CplxLim
en.desc: Convergence of complex sequences with explicit modulus.

zh.label: 复极限
zh.desc: 带显式模量的复数列收敛.

en.label: ConvRad
en.desc: Radius of convergence of a power series.

zh.label: 收敛半径
zh.desc: 幂级数的收敛半径.

en.label: CplxDiff
en.desc: Complex differentiability + Cauchy-Riemann.

zh.label: 复可微
zh.desc: 复可微 + Cauchy-Riemann.

en.label: Holo
en.desc: Holomorphic functions on open disks.

zh.label: 全纯
zh.desc: 开盘上的全纯函数.

en.label: CplxSer
en.desc: Convergent infinite complex sums.

zh.label: 复级数
zh.desc: 收敛的无限复求和.

en.label: Dirichlet
en.desc: Dirichlet series with abscissa of absolute convergence.

zh.label: Dirichlet
zh.desc: Dirichlet 级数及其绝对收敛 abscissa.

en.label: ZetaBasic
en.desc: Riemann zeta on Re(s) > 1, with Euler product.

zh.label: ζ 基础
zh.desc: Re(s)>1 上的 Riemann zeta 加 Euler 乘积.

en.label: ZetaCont
en.desc: Analytic continuation of zeta to C \ {1}.

zh.label: ζ 延拓
zh.desc: zeta 解析延拓到 C \ {1}.

en.label: CritStrip
en.desc: The critical strip 0 < Re(s) < 1 and the line Re(s) = 1/2.

zh.label: 关键带
zh.desc: 关键带 0<Re(s)<1 与关键线 Re(s)=1/2.

en.label: ZetaZeros
en.desc: Zero predicate of zeta; trivial vs non-trivial zeros.

zh.label: ζ 零点
zh.desc: zeta 零点谓词; 平凡零点 vs 非平凡零点.

en.label: Contour
en.desc: Contour integration as operation on holomorphic functions.

zh.label: 围道积分
zh.desc: 围道积分, 作为全纯函数上的操作.

en.label: AnaCont
en.desc: Analytic continuation as operation on holomorphic charts.

zh.label: 解析延拓
zh.desc: 解析延拓, 作为全纯图册上的操作.

en.label: Observer-Hist Identity
en.desc: Observer = Hist; observation = Cont; time = Hist growth.

zh.label: 观察者-Hist 同一性
zh.desc: 观察者 = Hist; 观察 = Cont; 时间 = Hist 增长.

en.label: Inter-Hist Locality
en.desc: Multi-Hist roadmap: from no global frame to a constant max-causal-rate.

zh.label: 跨-Hist 局部性
zh.desc: 多 Hist 路线图: 从无全局 frame 到常数最大因果率.

en.label: RHUp
en.desc: The Riemann Hypothesis as a BEDC conjecture interface.

zh.label: RHUp
zh.desc: 黎曼猜想作为 BEDC 猜想接口.

en.label: ZetaUp
en.desc: Riemann zeta function umbrella interface (basic + cont + zeros).

zh.label: ZetaUp
zh.desc: Riemann zeta 函数综合接口(基础+延拓+零点).

en.label: GammaUp
en.desc: Gamma function on C \ {0, -1, -2, ...}; meromorphic factor in zeta functional eq.

zh.label: GammaUp
zh.desc: C \ {0,-1,-2,...} 上的 Gamma 函数; ζ 函数方程中的亚纯因子.

en.label: PadicUp
en.desc: p-adic numbers; completion of Q under p-adic norm.

zh.label: PadicUp
zh.desc: p-adic 数; Q 在 p-adic 范数下的完备化.

en.label: AdeleUp
en.desc: Adele ring; restricted product of all completions of Q.

zh.label: AdeleUp
zh.desc: Adele 环; Q 所有完备化的限制积.

en.label: NormUp
en.desc: Normed space interface: vector space with a length function.

zh.label: NormUp
zh.desc: 赋范空间接口: 带长度函数的向量空间.

en.label: HilbertUp
en.desc: Hilbert space: complete inner-product space.

zh.label: HilbertUp
zh.desc: Hilbert 空间: 完备的内积空间.

en.label: MagmaUp
en.desc: Magma: a set with a binary operation, no further laws.

zh.label: MagmaUp
zh.desc: Magma: 带二元运算的集合, 无更多律法.

en.label: SemigroupUp
en.desc: Semigroup: associative magma.

zh.label: SemigroupUp
zh.desc: 半群: 满足结合律的 magma.

en.label: TopologyUp
en.desc: Topological space interface; opens / continuity / connectedness.

zh.label: TopologyUp
zh.desc: 拓扑空间接口; 开集/连续/连通.

en.label: CompletionUp
en.desc: Completion of a metric space; Cauchy-equivalence quotient.

zh.label: CompletionUp
zh.desc: 度量空间的完备化; Cauchy 等价商.

en.label: CalculusUp
en.desc: Differential / integral calculus on Real-valued functions.

zh.label: CalculusUp
zh.desc: 实值函数上的微分/积分.

en.label: MeasureUp
en.desc: Measure theory; Lebesgue / Borel structure.

zh.label: MeasureUp
zh.desc: 测度论; Lebesgue / Borel 结构.

en.label: FunctionalAnalysisUp
en.desc: Banach / Hilbert spaces; bounded operators.

zh.label: FunctionalAnalysisUp
zh.desc: Banach / Hilbert 空间; 有界算子.

en.label: ManifoldUp
en.desc: Smooth manifold; locally Euclidean with charts.

zh.label: ManifoldUp
zh.desc: 光滑流形; 局部欧式 + 图卡.

en.label: BundleUp
en.desc: Fiber bundle; total space + base space + projection.

zh.label: BundleUp
zh.desc: 纤维丛; 全空间 + 底空间 + 投影.

en.label: HomologyUp
en.desc: Singular / chain homology; topological invariants.

zh.label: HomologyUp
zh.desc: 奇异/链同调; 拓扑不变量.

en.label: EqUp
en.desc: Equality / sameness interface generalising hsame.

zh.label: EqUp
zh.desc: 等同接口, 泛化 hsame.

en.label: FuncUp
en.desc: Function interface; generic Hist-to-Hist mapping.

zh.label: FuncUp
zh.desc: 函数接口; 通用 Hist→Hist 映射.

en.label: LimitUp
en.desc: Limit interface; generic convergence carrier.

zh.label: LimitUp
zh.desc: 极限接口; 通用收敛载体.

en.label: FoldUp
en.desc: Fold / catamorphism interface over inductive carriers.

zh.label: FoldUp
zh.desc: 归纳载体上的 fold/catamorphism 接口.

en.label: SetLikeUp
en.desc: Set-like membership interface, finite / decidable.

zh.label: SetLikeUp
zh.desc: 类集合的成员关系接口, 有限/可判定.

en.label: TypeLikeUp
en.desc: Type-like inhabitation interface; carriers as types.

zh.label: TypeLikeUp
zh.desc: 类类型的居留接口; 载体作类型.

en.label: MulUp
en.desc: Multiplicative monoid interface.

zh.label: MulUp
zh.desc: 乘法 monoid 接口.

en.label: OrderUp
en.desc: Generic order-relation interface.

zh.label: OrderUp
zh.desc: 通用序关系接口.

en.label: TotallyBoundedUp
en.desc: Totally bounded metric space; finite ε-net for any ε.

zh.label: TotallyBoundedUp
zh.desc: 全有界度量空间; 任意 ε 都有有限 ε-网.

en.label: CompleteMetricUp
en.desc: Complete metric space; every Cauchy sequence converges.

zh.label: CompleteMetricUp
zh.desc: 完备度量空间; 每个 Cauchy 序列都收敛.

en.label: CompactMetricUp
en.desc: Compact metric: complete + totally bounded.

zh.label: CompactMetricUp
zh.desc: 紧致度量: 完备 + 全有界.

en.label: ContinuousMapUp
en.desc: Continuous map between metric / topological spaces.

zh.label: ContinuousMapUp
zh.desc: 度量/拓扑空间之间的连续映射.

en.label: StreamNameUp
en.desc: Stream-name interface; co-inductive carrier for Real.

zh.label: StreamNameUp
zh.desc: 流命名接口; Real 的共归纳载体.

en.label: ContAddUp
en.desc: Continuation-additive structure; the Cont-side of AddUp.

zh.label: ContAddUp
zh.desc: 延展加法结构; AddUp 的 Cont 侧.

en.label: UnaryContMonoidUp
en.desc: Unary continuation monoid; monoid laws expressed via UnaryCont.

zh.label: UnaryContMonoidUp
zh.desc: 一元延展幺半群; 通过 UnaryCont 表述的幺半群律.

en.label: RealAnalyticUp
en.desc: Real analytic functions on R; convergent power series locally.

zh.label: RealAnalyticUp
zh.desc: R 上的实解析函数; 局部收敛幂级数.

en.label: ComplexAnalyticUp
en.desc: Complex analytic = holomorphic; locally convergent power series in z.

zh.label: ComplexAnalyticUp
zh.desc: 复解析 = 全纯; z 中的局部收敛幂级数.

en.label: ComplexTopologyUp
en.desc: Topological structure on ComplexUp; opens / paths / connectedness.

zh.label: ComplexTopologyUp
zh.desc: ComplexUp 上的拓扑结构; 开集/路径/连通.
